steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: Before the blank is an independent clause (synthetic fibers are more durable). After it is another independent clause (manufacturing requires toxic chemicals).

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: A comma with a coordinating conjunction joins two independent clauses: IC, but IC. Omitting the conjunction creates a comma splice or run-on, while using the conjunction without the comma still misses the required punctuation. That matches Choice D — fibers, but.
